raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request for an opinion on a research section centrally invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and conceptual clarity.","R1.2":"The artifact makes several linked theoretical claims, so evaluating whether the reasoning chain is coherent is centrally implicated.","R1.3":"The passage connects convergence claims and Pareto frontier observations to experiments, making support between reported evidence and claims a central responsibility.","R1.6":"The artifact contains sentence-level and paragraph-level issues in grammar, tense, flow, and concision, so writing polish is centrally expected.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague request must disclose uncertainty about the intended kind of feedback.","RX.2":"The response must avoid inflating the delegation into responsibilities such as full novelty review or literature audit that were not clearly requested.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within projection rather than actually critiquing, rewriting, or editing the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading or unsupported academic claims downstream.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request for an opinion on a research section centrally invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and conceptual clarity.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes several linked theoretical claims, so evaluating whether the reasoning chain is coherent is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.3: The passage connects convergence claims and Pareto frontier observations to experiments, making support between reported evidence and claims a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact contains sentence-level and paragraph-level issues in grammar, tense, flow, and concision, so writing polish is centrally expected.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague request must disclose uncertainty about the intended kind of feedback.
rationale.RX.2: The response must avoid inflating the delegation into responsibilities such as full novelty review or literature audit that were not clearly requested.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within projection rather than actually critiquing, rewriting, or editing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading or unsupported academic claims downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact.
